signal-orange.$description: Signal Orange — Primary canvas — the full-viewport page background that changes on refresh; this is the design system

olive-ink.$description: Olive Ink — Primary text, headline color, and the only outlined action accent (outlined-button borders, link underlines) — warm dark green-brown that pairs with the orange field without competing chroma

oxblood.$description: Oxblood — Alternating surface variation — one of the page colors the background can take on refresh

burnt-sienna.$description: Burnt Sienna — Alternating surface variation — secondary warm shade the canvas can adopt

near-black.$description: Near Black — Alternating surface variation — deep cool surface the canvas can adopt, creates the darkest mode of the page

pearl.$description: Pearl — Soft warm highlight — one of the lighter surface variations the canvas can adopt

sage-mist.$description: Sage Mist — Soft cool surface variation — one of the muted color states the canvas cycles through

carbon.$description: Carbon — Album cover backgrounds, deep text on light surface states

ink.$description: Ink — Album cover backgrounds and heavy dark surface tone

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Album cover and card backgrounds within the grid

ash.$description: Ash — Mid-neutral for muted helper text and secondary surface states

paper.$description: Paper — Album cover backgrounds, text on dark surface states

helvetica-lt-pro.$description: The sole typeface across all text — display, heading, body, button, link. A single weight (400 regular) is used at every scale, which is the most distinctive typographic choice on the site. The whisper-regular giant-size headlines are anti-convention; most poster/editorial sites use 700–900 for display type, and using the book weight at 137px makes the headline feel stamped rather than shouted — authority through stillness.

helvetica.$description: Helvetica — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-viewport colored field that changes on refresh — the dominant surface

album-tile.$description: Surface level 1: Default album cover background within the grid

dark-album-tile.$description: Surface level 2: Dark album cover backgrounds for contrast within the grid
